## 2.2.2.E. PI #5

### What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?

Ground efficiency has suffered from increased traffic in the summer of 2025.

Further improvements will result from the use of :

1\. the CP1 Airport Operation Plan, although it should be noted that taxi-out time is dependent on weather conditions, particularly if de-icing is required.

2\. the deployment of new DARTS (LSZH only) where various ground efficiency elements are expected

### If the data at airport level are not available, please explain the reasons why data is missing and describe the measures planned to resolve the situation
